programme.desc: Late one evening, Rose brings a man home and they spend the night together. However, in the morning she finds that he has passed away. Even worse, she later discovers he was married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Truth Will Out
programme.desc: Rose is apprehensive about a visit from her daughter and granddaughter, since their reason for coming is to settle Rose's late-husband's will. Meanwhile, Blanche gets caught up in the tabloids of a society murder.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy
programme.desc: Blanche's visiting niece is a chip right off the old block when she dates a different man all night every night. Dorothy does battle with a mouse living in the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation
programme.desc: Dorothy is hesitant about having foot surgery just as she was scheduled to tap dance with Blanche and Rose at a dance recital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Adult Education
programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Television host Adam Conover visits. Chef Jason Fullilove prepares pulled pork agnolotti.

programme.title: South Park: Christmas Snow

programme.desc: When the government steals their new Gamesphere, the boys will stop at nothing to get it back. There is also a new dysfunctional character in South Park who tries to recruit the boys to his cause.

programme.desc: Towelie writes a book about his experiences getting over a drug addiction. With Oprah's help, the book becomes a best seller and his story inspires millions to turn their lives around, until the dame of daytime television catches Towelie in a lie.

programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Strange Case of Jeffrey Dahmer
programme.desc: The chilling account of a man who survived his encounter with the notorious serial killer, who managed to evade police scrutiny for years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Storm's Fury
programme.desc: The first major storm of the season threatens the family's progress. With a big bush wedding coming in days, the Browns race to obtain and haul much needed water tanks before the full force of the storm hits.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Very Bush Wedding
programme.desc: The wolfpack prepares for their first ever wedding in the bush. But as the family prepares to welcome a new member, emotions run high and the Browns struggle to keep their most ambitious project on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bam Bam's Big Build and Bears
programme.desc: A hungry predator encroaches deeper onto North Star Ranch forcing Bird and Gabe to take stronger action. Bam must play nice with his siblings in an effort to finally break ground on his homestead. Gabe has an incredible surprise for the Wolf Pack.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Off the Grid: Bear Meets Girl
programme.desc: Loaded with exclusive new footage from the Bush: An ostrich lays an egg and the siblings rush to incubate it. Later, Bear gets a special visitor and the family prepares to celebrate Billy and Ami's anniversary.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Noah's Animal Ark
programme.desc: The Browns flee the mountain during a dangerous lightning storm in the heat of fire season. To ensure their safety, they devise ingenious new fire safety measures, including a bush alert system and animal evacuation ark, which they put to the test.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Gary of The Jungle
programme.desc: All-star survivalist and wildcard Gary Golding takes on a jungle for the first time completely alone in Belize. Without a partner, Gary forms a bond with a turtle he names Timmy but a deep cut and dangerous infection threaten Gary's challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Lacey's Journey
programme.desc: All-Star survivalist Lacey Jones takes us through her first three challenges in Belize, Ecuador, and South Africa. With all-new insights, Lacey prepares herself for redemption in Africa for a 21-day challenge completely alone, coming up next.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: High-End Timber Frame Kitchen In Brevard, Nc
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders build a timber frame kitchen that will be the centerpiece of a high-end mountain retreat in Brevard, NC. Later, Mark and the guys visit some of the architect's other spectacular log homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Picture Perfect Cabin
programme.desc: Mark's client has a painting of a log cabin he wants to replicate so the team sets out to find the perfect cabin for the job. After settling on a cabin from an old project, the Barnwood Builders rebuild the structure with its huge logs in Texas.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Cabin at a Crossroads
programme.desc: Mark finds a cabin from a unique moment in history when pioneers started using new technology: the sawmill. Later, Mark visits another West Virginia cabin filled with family memories.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Fancy Cabin Takedown in Minor Hill
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work through layers of architectural history to uncover an original pioneer home. They hear stories from family members who lived in the cabin. Mark also visits a beautifully restored log home with its own extensive history.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Split Crew
programme.desc: Half the crew is in Ohio to save a 1830s log home, while the other half is back in West Virginia to tear down an old log barn.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Taking Down the Lincoln Cabin and Building a Dog Trot
programme.desc: Mark and the guys work to dismantle a barn built by Abe Lincoln's uncle around 1830.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a Log Chapel With a Stained Glass Window
programme.desc: Mark and the guys head to Johnny Jett's hometown in Kentucky to build a log chapel. First, they reclaim a stained glass window from a deteriorating 100-year-old church. Then they build the chapel and install the window.

programme.title: Reclaimed: Seeking Ore
programme.desc: Alex and Kevin are modern prospectors who look for business opportunities on old mining claims. Homesteader Judd and his family will need their help to re-open the mine, and build three much needed weatherproof structures before winter hits.

programme.title: Reclaimed: Paydirt or Bust
programme.desc: Alex and Kevin are called to renovate a mine's machine shop for mining to begin generating income. With 57 veins that could average a profit of upwards of $250,000 a day, the guys must negotiate a deal that could be their biggest payoff yet.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Winter's Fury
programme.desc: Marty, Matt and Misty Raney help the Russell family struggling on a failing homestead in the forests of Pennsylvania. During the biggest storm of the century, the family faces a food shortage with no hunting skills and a cabin on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Line of Fire
programme.desc: Marty has to create an evacuation ark for livestock while Matt devises a layer of fire protection to save a homestead in danger of a wildfire.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Shock and Awe
programme.desc: Marty tackles an off-grid hydropower system. Matt creates a meat smoker. One of the Raneys is injured in a surprise accident.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Holly's Story
programme.desc: Holly already has one failed weight loss surgery, so to succeed this time, she must do more than change her eating habits, she must address the childhood issues that continue to plague her.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Bethany's Story
programme.desc: Bethany has two daughters who live in fear of losing their mom to her food addiction. Once an addiction counselor, Bethany has gotten so big than she can no longer work. Now she risks losing her life, if Dr. Now can't help curb her addiction.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: J.T.'s Story
programme.desc: J.T. is almost 900lbs with a 100-lb lymphedema mass on his leg and a food addiction that is bound to kill him if he doesn't change. His girlfriend takes him to Houston, but when his behavior drives her away, J.T. is left with only Dr. Now to help.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: A House Divided
programme.desc: After a stressful first month of dieting, the sisters head back to Atlanta for their one-month check in with Dr. Procter to find out if they are on the right path to their weight goals. The results force Amy to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Mo Toes, Mo Problems

programme.desc: Quadriplegic Rachelle Friedman, the 'paralyzed bride', defies the odds by having her own child. Unable to walk and without dexterity in her hands, Rachelle must learn to cope with a newborn with the same determination she approaches all aspects of life.

programme.title: What Not to Wear: Casey D.
programme.desc: Casey is a transsexual who has been living as a woman for the past nine years. Stacy and Clinton help this transgender woman find a style that reflects the confident, happy woman that she is.

programme.title: What Not to Wear: Katherine
programme.desc: 22-year-old journalism student gets and updated look months before graduation day.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Lonely in Flagstaff

programme.title: Sister Wives: Four Wives, One House?
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Kody finally presents to his family his pitch for all four wives to live in one big house. Janelle actually likes the idea, but Christine is dead set against it. Merry Christmas!

programme.title: Tallest Teens
programme.desc: Meet three of the tallest teenagers in America and learn how they fit into a society designed for people several feet shorter and how will their size impact their future.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Every Rosacea Has Its Thorn

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Lipoma Whisperer

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Somewhere in My Pile
programme.desc: Beverly's clutter fills every last square inch of her home. Upstairs, her three beloved dogs have made the space absolutely unlivable. With the threat of the city condemning her home, Beverly must clear the hoard or risk losing everything.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Three Apartments, Three Hoarders
programme.desc: An apartment complex has not one, not two, but three extreme hoarders. For years their hoarding has gone unchecked but with building now under strict management, everything is about to change.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Maja's Story
programme.desc: Maja moves to Houston to undertake a difficult weight-loss journey with the support of her boyfriend Christian. But when Christian decides he's had enough and leaves Maja high and dry, she will discover that the only person she can count on is herself.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nick and Melissa

programme.desc: Nev and Max attempt to help a young woman named Nae track down her elusive internet celebrity crush and soon find themselves embroiled in a Catfish conspiracy!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sparkayla and Maritha

programme.title: True Life Crime: Killed for Gender Identity or Secrets?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Shot and a Shave
programme.desc: Rick is offered some of the craziest items ever to enter the store, from a quilt made of celebrity's signatures to an 1845 Harpers Ferry musket.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Peeping Pawn
programme.desc: The team is presented with a rare 1776 Massachusetts penny made by Paul Revere. Rick gets the chance to buy a hand grenade made by a top-secret American World War II spy program. A man hopes to sell his 1950s peep show machine.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Silent and Deadly
programme.desc: A piece of marble from Abraham Lincoln's tomb enters the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawnocchio
programme.desc: Some handcrafted Pinocchio dolls wander into the shop. A guy brings in a Cy Young baseball card from 1909. A man comes by with a harmonica that once belonged to 'Aerosmith' front man Steven Tyler.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick 'n' Roll
programme.desc: Rick attends Rock 'n' Roll Fantasy Camp and gets a chance to perform with rock legend Roger Daltrey of The Who. Meanwhile, Chumlee and the Old Man check out a collection of tin toys from the early 1900s. Then, a tonsillotome finds its way into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chumlee's Last Laugh
programme.desc: Rick and Corey check out a massive Dukes of Hazzard toy collection. Then, time flies when a pocket watch engraved with Henry Ford II's signature lands in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: All In
programme.desc: A poker cheating device finds its way into the shop. Then, a mysterious suicide ring believed to be from WWII finds its way into Rick's fingers.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Put Up Your Nukes
programme.desc: A seller claims he has a cover for a thermonuclear warhead. Then, Corey swings into action when a mandolin from Bob Wills' Texas Playboys comes into the shop. Later, Chumlee tries to find something he's better at than Rick.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Tricky Ricky
programme.desc: Go long with the Pawn Stars when a signed jersey from San Diego Chargers quarterback Dan Fouts gets thrown into the shop. Then, Rick tries to learn the trick of the trade when Harry Blackstone's vanishing birdcage appears.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Mail Mayhem
programme.desc: A signed first edition of 'The Wizard of Oz' and a one of a kind Turbo Drive II arcade game arrive at the shop. Also, Rick goes searching for a package that was supposedly delivered to him.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick's Roulette
programme.desc: Rick is in Hollywood to auction off some of the shop's coolest finds. Back in Vegas, Corey and Chum check out an Ultra 4 race car. Then, Rick checks out one of the largest Mickey Mouse collections in the world.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Lock Stock and Two Nickel Barrels
programme.desc: A rare movie poster for John Wanye's first ever film is offered to Rick for a hefty price. Chum inspects a pair of nickel-plated pistols whose creator is claimed to be the Victorian era's most famous gun maker.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Spider Pawn
programme.desc: Rick looks into the authenticity of a rare 1936 Zippo prototype. Corey's wants to snag an antique rotary phone for the right price. Chumlee meets Marvel Comics creator and legendary writer Stan Lee.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sign of the Times
programme.desc: Rick Dale joins Rick to prove to Corey that he struck oil with an old Gulf sign. Then, a 1930s collectible from the Indy 500 sends Chumlee racing, and Corey snoops out what might be a Charles Schulz original illustration of Charlie Brown, and more.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawning for Treble
programme.desc: In Chicago, Rick meets a wrestling legend and gets a chance at a Michael Jordan championship jersey. Meanwhile, Chum looks to score big on a 300-yeat-old violin. Afterwards, Corey and Chum bet on a vintage Batman playhouse.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Bloodlust: Real Vampires
programme.desc: From Bram Stoker's 1897 novel to the rise of the undead in popular culture, Vampires have caught our attention in recent decades. We travel to Bulgaria to investigate claims of a real Vampire burial and examine accounts of vampires.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasure of the Templars
programme.desc: The Knights Templar may have discovered a great treasure in Jerusalem and brought it back to Europe to become more powerful than the Pope itself. We try to solve the mystery of why this treasure disappeared.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Holy Grail
programme.desc: Find out what The Holy Grail could have been, whether it was a cup from the Last Supper or used to cleanse Jesus’ body after the Crucifixion, and see where it could be today.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasures of Petra
programme.desc: It is one of the great wonders of the ancient world, but there is little information on who built the magnificent city of Petra in Jordan and why. See what treasure remains buried there and the dark secrets that remain in this mysterious place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Ark of the Convenant
programme.desc: The Biblical mystery of the whereabouts of the Ark of the Covenant is unravelled on a quest across continents. Believed to be the throne of God himself, the search for the Ark leads us to where many are convinced is its current resting place, Ethiopia.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Top Secret Nazi UFOs
programme.desc: Investigating claims that the Nazis had developed a brand new flying craft at a secret research facility in Northern Germany and that the Americans and Russians stole this technology after the war.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Chandra Levy
programme.desc: Marcia Clark examines the mysterious death of Chandra Levy, the Washington DC intern who had an alleged affair with United States Congressman, Gary Condit. With no one held accountable for Chandra's brutal murder, Marcia investigates what really happened.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Blood Lust
programme.desc: The city of Atlanta is gripped with fear as a deadly killer prowls the streets for unsuspecting victims with a powerful gun.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: The Good Student/ Left in Danger/ Lady on a Bridge
programme.desc: Detectives search for a missing student, hunt down an alleged gang member, and save a woman threatening suicide on a bridge.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Broken Home
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a young mother is ambushed at home and shot at close range. Detective Rob Barrere's case depends solely on the eyewitness account of a four-year-old girl and leads to another brutal death.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: Mother's Day/ Somebody Knows
programme.desc: Detectives hit the streets in search of a 48-year-old woman whose two grown daughters fear she is the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: The Spreckels Mansion Mystery

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Broken Home
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a young mother is ambushed at home and shot at close range. Detective Rob Barrere's case depends solely on the eyewitness account of a four-year-old girl and leads to another brutal death.

programme.title: American Justice: Crime Family
programme.desc: A profile of infamous mob boss Vito Genovese and how he built the most ruthless and powerful crime family in the nation. Includes interviews with Genovese's godson, FBI agents and prosecutors.

programme.title: American Justice: The Monster Inside
programme.desc: In a controversial case, rapist Rex Allen Krebs was found guilty of murder in 2001.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Animal Instinct
programme.desc: Two officers are helped by the K9 Unit to corral a suspect who takes off running after a car chase. Rush and Rutledge struggle to convince a man with heart problems to go to the hospital. A car careens off a bridge and the driver can't be found.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Stranger Things
programme.desc: A woman tells officers her boyfriend once brought her back to life after she was murdered. A purse snatching suspect stops running to eat some chicken strips, and a tarot card reader gets dehydrated.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: A woman drives with 60 pounds of dope in her car trunk while her daughter sleeps in the backseat.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Sister Load
programme.desc: The seizure of 350 pounds of marijuana leads the unit to a similar sister load coming from Mexico.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The New C
programme.desc: A new informant is willing to give up vital information about dealers in exchange for help with his legal troubles.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Fifty Tons
programme.desc: A local casino's connection to a prostitution ring may give detectives the chance to hurt the cartels.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Cartel City
programme.desc: The team's K-9 sniffs out a package with black tar heroin hidden inside a child's teddy bear.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Show Me the Money
programme.desc: Roly goes undercover to nab a top cocaine and heroin dealer, whose most recent crime involved shooting an officer.

programme.title: Crime 360: Midnight Shootout
programme.desc: A gun battle breaks out in a quiet Cleveland suburb causing chaos for the neighbourhood. In the morning, a young father of two is found dead in his bedroom, and a single bullet may help to catch the killer.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Playing Doctor
programme.desc: 24-year-old Jessika Rovell falls for Jeffrey Marsalis' charm and good looks but when she discovers his secret online life as Dr. Jeff, she realizes she's been dating a monster who stalks dating websites.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Swipe Right for Murder
programme.desc: When Ashley Pegram goes missing after meeting a man through a dating app, the race to find her focuses on her internet admirer. Detectives soon discover she is caught up in a nightmarish trap set by an online predator with murder on his mind.

programme.title: Web of Lies: People You May Know
programme.desc: Single mom Lorianna Parker is excited when she meets popular good-looking Corey Davis online, and filled with hope as their friendship blossoms. But when she goes to meet him in the flesh, her dream date turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Facade
programme.desc: When two teenage girls fall in love, their hedonistic lifestyle is played out on social media for all to see. Behind the façade, petty jealousies and insecurities escalate until finally the pressure erupts in a frenzy of shocking violence.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: No Good Deed
programme.desc: After a man is brutally gunned down in the middle of the street, Kenda must piece together a puzzle of conflicting stories and dead ends. Then, a bloody body is discovered in a popular mall and Kenda must make sense of the gruesome and mysterious scene.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: 12 Years a Fugitive
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother is found stabbed to death in her own home, Kenda must turn to a tight-knit community still grieving from the tragic loss. After 12 years of searching, they finally uncover the fiendish plot to exploit the helpless victim.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Mother and Child
programme.desc: An unbelievable tragedy ripples through a small community and sends John in pursuit of outlaw Jory Worthen. Callahan takes on the case of fugitive Derrell Demon Brown, an offender with a dark past who committed a violent, personal crime.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly. Then, when a college student is strangled in his home, Lt. Kenda must figure out which of his roommates is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: 12 Years a Fugitive

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: No Good Deed
programme.desc: After a man is brutally gunned down in the middle of the street, Kenda must piece together a puzzle of conflicting stories and dead ends. Then, a bloody body is discovered in a popular mall and Kenda must make sense of the gruesome and mysterious scene.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Under Seige
programme.desc: A woman calls 911, saying her husband is exchanging gunfire with intruders, and her toddler is outside with them. Police find the boy safe, though the husband is dead.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Tears For My Mother
programme.desc: A man calls 911 claiming he found his ex-girlfriend dead, and his behavior on the call leads police to wonder if he could be involved. Investigators tirelessly gather evidence to convict a killer whose unchecked rage left a young son motherless.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Deviant Deeds
programme.desc: A man is hysterical when he finds his brother's girlfriend and roommate beaten with an iron and stabbed to death on the floor. The brothers appear devastated, but the discovery of her missing phone casts doubt on their alibis.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Fear Travels Fast
programme.desc: Aurora, Indiana hadn't seen a murder in decades until Leigh Jennings was killed in her own home. Residents are horrified when the beloved mother and hairstylist is found dead. In a case where everyone liked the victim, anyone could be the killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Witch Hunter
programme.desc: Christmas is ruined when hikers in New Mexico stumble across Roxanne Houston's shallow grave. The murder rocks the community of Taos and tension builds between those with small town values and the outsider lifestyle on the Mesa.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Deadly Ride: Part One
programme.desc: The former Uber driver who terrorized Michigan City during a deadly shooting rampage on February 20, 2016 has been sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Deadly Ride: Part Two
programme.desc: The former Uber driver who terrorized Michigan City during a deadly shooting rampage on February 20, 2016 has been sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Chance Encounter
programme.desc: A night of partying by fraternity brothers ends with a knock on the door and gunfire. One student is dead, three are wounded, and a freshman freely admits he was the shooter. He claims it was self-defence. But others say he was looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Almost Home
programme.desc: Gayle Isleib was shot on April 30, 1996. Police identify a co-worker, Tyronne Montgomery. Evidence is found of stalking, plans to kidnap Gayle, murder her husband and love poems to Gayle. Tyrone Montgomery was convicted of 1st degree Murder.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Living a Lie
programme.desc: Bob Peterson invites himself to his co-workers Gene and Jaye-Jaye Thurnau's new home to give them a housewarming present. That evening, Jaye-Jaye leaves the guys to run an errand.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Never Predicted
programme.desc: When Andrea Farrington meets fellow employee Alex Kozak she thinks that romance could be on the horizon. She has no idea that feelings of romance will be replaced by suspicion and fear, leading to a final rejection that has fatal consequences.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Screaming Terror
programme.desc: Alice Hufnagle was raped and murdered on November 22. 2002. After following numerous leads and dead-ends, Police find the vital clues that lead them to Jeffery Vample, Alice's co-worker from a local Pharmacy.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Castro and the Cold Cream
programme.desc: The true story of how the CIA turned Fidel Castro's lover into a deadly assassin and sent her on a mission to kill their formidable enemy.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Fortress of War
programme.desc: The Story of how two CIA operatives, in search of Osama bin Laden, stop a Taliban uprising in an Afghan fortress. They are outnumbered leaving one operative to pay the ultimate price.

programme.title: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Featuring interviews with the world's leading experts, this film delves into the amazing lost world of the Minoans and highlights the startling parallels between Bronze Age Thera and Plato's Atlantis.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Hollywood Syndicate
programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Castro and the Cold Cream

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow are among the most famous outlaws in history. Murderers and hold-up artists, the pair robbed numerous banks, gas stations and stores in rural areas and killed at least nine people during their spree.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: George Francis Barnes J, better known as 'Machine Gun Kelly,' was an Irish American gangster during the Prohibition era. His nickname came from his favourite weapon, a Thompson submachine gun.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: John Dillinger
programme.desc: John Dillinger was the most brazen of the infamous criminals of the Great Depression, and probably the most brutal, credited with a string of bank robberies and at least a dozen murders across Indiana in 1933.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Sparks Fly

programme.title: Building Alaska: Crunch Time
programme.desc: Impending weather is making crunch time at the builds that much more desperate. Rich is forced to make a crucial building decision. Tom risks stranding his workers. Creig battles freezing temperatures.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Suburban House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike and Michael Jr. take things to the next level as they decide to go into business together. They purchase an outdated, suburban property and face a wonky layout, too many stairs and open-concept headaches.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Mike's Minneapolis Home Hunt
programme.desc: Brenda and Peter have two young daughters and love their Minneapolis neighborhood, but the family has outgrown their home and they're ready to purchase a new one. The couple needs Mike's honest expertise as they view the houses they're considering.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Investment in Brooklyn Park
programme.desc: Carpenter Jake and his realtor wife Lindsay want to buy an investment home to live in, fix up and eventually sell for a profit. The couple shows their favorite options to Mike who helps them see the good, the bad and the ugly.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: No Ordinary Buy in Minneapolis
programme.desc: Mike helps Nick and Samantha choose a new home. Sam and Nick are looking at brand new houses and many have yet to be lived in, which means all the more reason to bring along the King of Contractors.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Holmes Views St. Anthony Homes
programme.desc: In St. Anthony, Minnesota, Rhonda and Leo Bogee are looking for a home that's both within their budget and perfect for their four-member family. Mike goes through houses pointing out the pros and cons for each teaching them how to buy with confidence.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: The Golden Oak Menace
programme.desc: Bug and his team travel to West Petaluma, CA, to take down a 95-year-old egg house that's dangerously close to a high-voltage power line.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: C&O Railway
programme.desc: The team travels to Clifton Forge, Virginia, to conquer C&O Railway's vast repair space. They work to salvage the steam engine repair plant by saving railway bases and corrugated glass. Later, they take apart a baby grand piano.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former Dixie Furniture Plant
programme.desc: The team travel to a vacant furniture plant in Lexington, NC, where they work in near-darkness salvaging conveyor belts, fire doors, veneer molds, factory carts, and industrial lights.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Virginia Victorian Home
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to Hot Springs, VA, to salvage mantles, cabinets, sinks and a round window from a late Victorian-style home.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Wayne Lanes Bowling Alley
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Wayne Lanes in Waynesboro, VA, to salvage bowling balls, bowling pins, bowling shoes and whatever else they can find in the alley. Robert is determined to redeem himself from last season's bowling fiasco.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Laverock Hill Estate
programme.desc: The crew heads to Glenside, PA to salvage a huge estate. The sprawling mansion gives the Dawgs a run for their money as they try to save columns, doors, mantles, bathtubs and more. Mike and Tay visit Rural Retreat to find a piece for a coffee table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Cosby Brothers Mill
programme.desc: Mike and Robert give Tay a history lesson with an old dentistry x-ray machine before the team loads up for a project in Grottoes, VA. They start at Cosby Brothers Mill where they hope to salvage some old mill parts.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Marine Salvage
programme.desc: Mike and Robert head to Amelia Island, Florida, and get lessons in diving and safety so they can salvage under water. They recover old ship parts from the bottom of the ocean and transform them into an original piece.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Michael's Catholic School
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs team head to the St. Michael's Catholic School in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, where they brave high-wire heights in order to save elements of the past. The team also builds a ladder console and discovers a vintage army record player.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lerner House
programme.desc: The crew travels to Orange, VA to salvage a 1930s brick mansion, including its columns and windows. Mike and Robert return General George C. Marshall's door to the Virginia Military Institute. Tay and Mike build a coffee table from a door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Price Fuller Machine Shop
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, Grayson and Tay head to the Machine Shop they bought to see what they can find. The team finds items for new builds. As they're renovating the house on their property, they find many new builds are needed. Mike and Tay make a coffee bar.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Texas Tavern Sign
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs work at home in Roanoke, Virginia, where they salvage a sign for the Texas Tavern and learn the history of the local restaurant over burgers and bowls of chili.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Trinity Lutheran Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Greencastle, PA, to salvage an old church that is being restored for a physical therapy office. The team struggles to figure out the best way to remove the windows, salvage the large bell and execute an idea for a console.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc: On the menu is a 24 layer chocolate cake and succulent duck smothered in gravy and cheese.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Hot and Spicy
programme.desc: Things start heating up when Tyler Florence, Ted Allen, Ina Garten, The Neelys and others share their best ever hot and spicy dishes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Simply Irresistible
programme.desc: Find out what various chefs have to say about roasted chicken, sticky buns, and seafood.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Regional Favorites
programme.desc: Go to New Orleans for shrimp po' boy and Maine for the ultimate lobster feast.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked and Stacked
programme.desc: Duff Goldman makes a guest appearance at Michael Symon's favorite Baton Rouge, La. smokehouse that boasts a pork belly hoagie so outrageous it has to be shared. Next up in St. Louis, a big fat Greek burger ignites Michael's cultural soul, and in Austin.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot, Charred and Crispy
programme.desc: Cooking Channel's Haylie Duff joins Michael Symon at one of his most treasured New Orleans spots.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Knows Best
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon takes down a towering fortress of succulent ribs and a sandwich that's a meaty trifecta of juicy brisket, pork and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Spiced, Salty and Succulent
programme.desc: Michael heads to Austin for barbecue sandwich that has the entire town line up. In Jersey City, a chef concocts his own sweet and spicy burger creation. In Louisville, KY, Michael washes down a pastrami spiced sandwich with a refreshing local dessert.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Twist On Texas 'cue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits two restaurants in the Lone Star State that turn traditional Texas-style barbecue into crafty culinary creations.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Wild And Shuckling Delicious
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is firing up three different rigs to cook a whole hog, racks of ribs and bushels of oysters for the ultimate South Carolina-style surf and turf.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Spicy
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best spicy foods in restaurants across the country. He's in the kitchen with spice-loving chefs preparing the hottest recipes in America and revealing their tongue-scorching secrets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Cod
programme.desc: Andrew explores the treasures of Cape Cod's coastal cuisine. From fried clams to fresh-caught cod, clambakes to cranberry bog ice cream, the Massachusetts peninsula's culinary scene is cause for summertime celebration.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Hamptons
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the seafood masterworks of the Hamptons. From delectable surf and turf to buttery lobster rolls, clam chowder to smoked bluefish pate, the Hamptons' dinner scene is sizzling.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Twist On Texas 'cue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits two restaurants in the Lone Star State that turn traditional Texas-style barbecue into crafty culinary creations.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Wild And Shuckling Delicious
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is firing up three different rigs to cook a whole hog, racks of ribs and bushels of oysters for the ultimate South Carolina-style surf and turf.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Spicy

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Cod
programme.desc: Andrew explores the treasures of Cape Cod's coastal cuisine. From fried clams to fresh-caught cod, clambakes to cranberry bog ice cream, the Massachusetts peninsula's culinary scene is cause for summertime celebration.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: PJ Masks: The Wolfy Plan/ The Lizard Theft
programme.desc: Rip tries to gather feathers from Owlette's wings to let the Wolfies fly.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Summer, the Great/ Planet Gonzo
programme.desc: Gonzo the Great decides to teach Summer how to perform daring feats of daring! The Muppet Babies hop in a rocket ship and travel to Planet Gonzo where everyone looks just like him!

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Summer Penguin, P.I./ You Ought to Be in Pictures
programme.desc: Summer assumes the role of detective when a heated game of checkers turns unpleasant. While on a field trip to a local art museum, Fozzie's lunchbox is stolen by a mischievous monkey and the Muppet Babies must chase him through paintings to get it back.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cousin Cody/ Hissy's Lost To
programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Luna's Cosmic Tantrum/ Motsuki The Best
programme.desc: Motsuki becomes Owelette's sidekick; Motsuki traps Luna Girl on the moon.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Pinball/ Bounce-a-Tron
programme.desc: The team thwarts Romeo's plan to play a game of pinball in the city with wrecking balls. Catboy wants to prove he is great by stopping Night Ninja on his own.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Dinosaur Romp
programme.desc: When Professor Von Drake's Tick-Tock Time Machine lets a little dinosaur named Baby Dinah loose in the Clubhouse Carnival, Mickey and pals travel back in time to return Baby Dinah to her prehistoric home .

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Bird
programme.desc: Goofy finds a lost bird and Mickey helps him bring it back home to his mom in the forest.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Bunsen Knows All/ Doctor Fozzie
programme.desc: Bunsen is asked a question he doesn't know the answer to so he fibs and the lie grows out of control! While playing pretend hospital, Doctor Fozzie quickly gets too many patients.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Karate Cub/Don't Over Duet
programme.desc: Fozzie must learn some 'Camilla-rate' in order to join the martial arts team, The Kickin' Chickens. Piggy practices her performance for Miss Nanny too hard and loses her voice!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Roadsterettes! / Oh Happy Day!
programme.desc: Famous race car driver Pippa Powers visits Hot Dog Hills for a reunion with her old car club. The Happy Helpers must show Mr. McSnorter how to relax on vacation.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Adventures in Buddysitting!
programme.desc: Mickey and Goofy join the Hot Dog Hills' Invention Competition; the Happy Helpers babysit for the day at the Hot Dog Hills.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Best
programme.desc: By playing a variety of games, Pluto and Butch, Pete's dog competing for a trophy.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Sea Captain Mickey
programme.desc: When Professor Von Drake’s sonar-detecting machine discovers that there’s something big at the bottom of Mickey Lake, Mickey and the gang hop into the Clubhouse Submarine and set out to find the 'Big Something'.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Coconutty Monkey
programme.desc: Coco the Monkey is planning to have a Coconutty Milk Party for everyone.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pete's Beach Blanket Luau
programme.desc: It's the hottest day of the year and Pete decides to put on a Luau down at the lake.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: A Surprise for Minnie
programme.desc: Mickey enlists our help in making and delivering a special card for Minnie.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Clubhouse Rocks
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals join together for a Clubhouse battle of the bands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Pony Tale
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake's new Fritzer-Spritzer Spray Potion is accidentally sprayed on Daisy's ponytail, making it grow super long.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Big Balloon Race
programme.desc: Mickey helps Donald fly in the Big Balloon Race so he can win a big blue ribbon. They use stickers to patch up the balloon and an elephant helps weigh the balloon down after it flies into orbit. Later, they rescue Pete, who's stuck in a tree.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Jr.
programme.desc: Donald needs help teaching his young duckling prodigy Donald Jr. how to do the steps to a special song and dance routine.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Pit Stop and Go!/ Alarm on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's the first 'Pit Stop and Go Rally' where pit crews compete against each other. The Happy Helpers look after Clara Cluck's farm while she's out of town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Daisy's Photo Finish! / Super-Charged: Daisy's Grande Goal
programme.desc: Minnie and Daisy travel to Brazil's Amazon rainforest to help Daisy's cousin get a picture of a rare bird. During a Roadster Soccer match, Daisy's competitiveness gets out of hand.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goofy Gas/ Little Big Ape
programme.desc: When Goofy invents a new fuel to make the roadsters go faster, they wind up with unexpected results. The Happy Helpers try to capture a gorilla that is loose in Clarabelle's house.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goofy's Drive-In / The Iron Mouse
programme.desc: Everyone works together to save Goofy's favourite drive-in theater.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Luck Charm/ Teed Off!
programme.desc: When Goofy credits his recent good luck to his Rubber Duck, Daisy decides borrow it.

programme.title: Bluey: Kids/ Butterflies/ The Creek
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey want to play a game during a shopping trip; Bluey runs away, leaving Bingo all alone; The kids and Dad go on an outing to the creek.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks/Good Reef
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Double Doggie Dare!/ Empire State of Mind
programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Seat at the Theatre/ Bye Bye Butterfly
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a butterfly get home to its family in Mexico. The pugs push Bob's office chair to a theater to see his favorite play.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: A Very Sticky Problem/ Forward Marsh
programme.desc: Mazu sees life through a raptor’s eyes when she gets stuck to Cror by some tar. Rocky hopes to get the best viewing spot to watch the "winter lights" dance across the night sky.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Frozen Giganto/ Dinosia
programme.desc: Explore the world with dinosaur friends in search of the biggest dino of them all!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Stop That Heist/ Lights! Camera! Help!
programme.desc: Billy Beagle's famous Golden Rumble Seat Roadster becomes the target of an infamous international thief. The Happy Helpers become personal assistants to a movie star!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Smarty Goof/ Adventures in Buddysitting!
programme.desc: Mickey and Goofy join the Hot Dog Hills' Invention Competition. Later, when the Hot Tog Hills play center closes, the Happy Helpers become babysitters for the day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Legend of Ol' Snapper/Adventures in Puppy-Sitting
programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: PJ Masks: The Prank Wheelz/ Where's the Wolfie Wheelz?
programme.desc: The Wolfies turn their Wolf Wheelz into Prank Wheelz. Luna Girl and Motsuki are controlling the Wolf Wheelz to wreak havoc causing the Wolfies and the PJ Masks to work together.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Villian of the Sky/Protector of the Sky
programme.desc: The PJ Masks discover Romeo's Sky Factory and send PJ Robot as a mole. When the Sky Factory creates a pollution cloud over the city, the PJ Masks have a hard time blowing it away!

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Open Wide and Say Aaahg

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly Odd Fairy Tales
programme.desc: In order to put a restless Poof to sleep, Wanda decides to read him a book of fairy tales.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dave Rebooted/ Germs

programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Adult Education
programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: Frasier: A Word to the Wiseguy

programme.desc: Lucy can't seem to get dressed or order dinner at a restaurant without changing her mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry

programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: High Country Bear Lair
programme.desc: The Raneys build an old style root cellar and an innovative greenhouse and attempt to inspire two off-grid reluctant teenage sisters to help bring their father's dream to life.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake on the Forty
programme.desc: The Raneys return to Alaska to discover their own homestead in utter disrepair. Beetle kill has destroyed their only access, so they race to build a steel tram before the deep freeze sets in.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Moose Mayhem
programme.desc: To save a single mom and her daughter from rampaging moose and secure a source of food, Marty builds a bridge across a murky creek to access more property, Matt teaches predator deterrent techniques, and Misty builds a snow-proof greenhouse.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: House of 30,000 Tires
programme.desc: With extra facts and bonus scenes: The Raneys help a struggling Ohio family in a home made of 30,000 tire bales. Intruding pests, flooding and unstable walls make this one of the Raneys' biggest challenges yet.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Cobbers Nightmare
programme.desc: The Raneys continue rescuing the Broadhead's tire bale homestead in Central Ohio. The clock is ticking in part two of this rescue as Marty, Misty, and Matt work to provide fresh water, strengthen walls, and jumpstart an indoor garden.

programme.title: Reclaimed: Cabin in the Sky
programme.desc: Alex and Kevin are on a mission to help Ben and Laura build a cabin on their newly bought claim. The guys hope to negotiate for mining rights, but at 11,500 feet in altitude, the claim is nearly inaccessible. The only way up is by helicopter.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Bears and the Bees
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead with a bee-obsessed owner unintentionally attracting bears with his hives. Marty bush-engineers a windmill to pump water to a new bathhouse, but the dangerous North Carolina wind threatens progress.

programme.title: Reclaimed: Cabin in the Sky

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Killzone
programme.desc: Marty helps homesteaders in Oregon build a barn; Misty creates a subterranean garden; Matt finds a human approach to a mysterious predator threat.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Cobbers Nightmare
programme.desc: The Raneys continue rescuing the Broadhead's tire bale homestead in Central Ohio. The clock is ticking in part two of this rescue as Marty, Misty, and Matt work to provide fresh water, strengthen walls, and jumpstart an indoor garden.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Baggage

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Blizzard
programme.desc: With less than a week remaining in the shortest ice mining season on record, every crew is battling the clock. But just when they think it couldn't get any harder, a massive Arctic storm descends on Nome.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Deadline
programme.desc: After a month out on the ice, one day remains in the 2015 ice mining season. For every miner, that's one more day to prove that a season full of risks was worth the cost.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Gamble

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Undercover and Out of Time

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Best in the Business

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Narrow Escape

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Not Ready to Fly
programme.desc: Nick enlists his youngest son to gather photo intelligence, which proves crucial in an assignment riddled with unforeseen obstacles.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: International Situation
programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his vast network of professionals travel to Turkey and France to hunt down two Airbus A320s for repossession.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Mid-Air Collision

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Alone in Alaska

programme.title: Gold Rush: Epic Fails
programme.desc: To strike it rich gold miners risk it all and when it goes wrong it can result in an epic fail: flipped rock trucks, a burning washplant, sunken excavators and more.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: You've Been Marked
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore that still has the seashore in it and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's 'out-of-this-world.'

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Simon Soft
programme.desc: Michael turns iced tea into a tea candle and later, at a pet store, he reveals that caterpillars have wicks. Plus, at a warehouse, Michael stumps his assistant when he proves that big tricks come in shrink-wrapped packages.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the 'call of nature.' Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes
programme.desc: Michael works in a spice shop and gets an icy treatment with his take on 'chilly flakes'. Plus, he cleans a spill at a hotel with his phone. Afterwards, at an abandoned house, he amazes his assistant by climbing through a wormhole.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Ronnie Jordan Headlines
programme.desc: Headliner Ronnie Jordan brings the heat tonight and is joined by funny woman Jade Catta-Preta as she shares the secret to relationship success. Plus, Blaq Ron gets a salsa lesson.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Orlando Leyba Headlines
programme.desc: Orlando Leyba headlines. Plus, Donnell Rawlings tells a story about the time his bike was stolen, and Just Nesh breaks loose in the dressing room.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Italian Food Matter
programme.desc: Michael uncovers ancient secrets at an Asian gift shop, reveals a transformative spray at Eataly and leaves his assistant speechless at a photo shoot.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Industrial Asphalt Sealant
programme.desc: Michael trains his coworkers how to hold a dog who can't hold it. A man can vanish into a manhole, and maybe even a manhole can vanish itself.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pineapple Breeze
programme.desc: Michael reveals an exciting new way to fix a tablet, makes a drink that's impossible to swallow and turns a dog into the smartest animal in the world.

programme.desc: Michael turns leftovers into beauty products at a soap shop, and at a record store, he shows a hip-hop fan how to jump around. Plus, at a children's store, Michael's co-worker learns about the dangers of babysitting.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Red Flag
programme.desc: A landowner is spoken to for a second time about illegally hunting dove over bait. An injured deer is found hiding in a shed after being attacked. While pulling over a suspicious vehicle, the game wardens notice the driver hiding something under his seat.

programme.desc: A landowner is spoken to for a second time about illegally hunting dove over bait. An injured deer is found hiding in a shed after being attacked. While pulling over a suspicious vehicle, the game wardens notice the driver hiding something under his seat.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Sloth Couples Therapy

programme.title: The Zoo: The Tiger's Dance
programme.desc: When keepers introduce two tigers as potential mates, the process proves bumpy. A pair of African porcupines arrive at the zoo, requiring delicate handling. And a pregnancy check on a 3,000 pound rhino necessitates some highly specialized equipment.

programme.desc: Martin and a friend find themselves in big trouble after committing credit card fraud.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Name Game
programme.desc: Dre and Bow have a gender reveal party, and Dre is thrilled because it's his turn to name the baby. He decides on a culturally significant name that Bow and Ruby aren't a fan of.

programme.title: Black-ish: I'm a Survivor
programme.desc: When Dre goes back to Compton for a funeral, he is reunited with his old crew and struggles with survivor's remorse for the friends he left behind. Meanwhile, Bow becomes self-conscious when Ruby criticizes her parenting style.

programme.title: Black-ish: One Angry Man
programme.desc: Dre is forced to participate in jury duty after Junior responds to the summons that was thrown away. The case is supposed to be open and shut, but when Dre sees that the defendant is a young African American, he feels responsible to give him a fair trial.

programme.title: Black-ish: ToysRn'tUs
programme.desc: Janine gives Diane a white Girlstory doll for her birthday, and when Bow tries to return it for a black doll, she is shocked by the limited options offered.

programme.title: Black-ish: Manternity
programme.desc: Dre considers taking paternity leave after he realizes that Zoey is arguably the best child and their bond developed while he was unemployed when she was born. Meanwhile, Bow tries to hide her pregnancy in order to get a promotion.

programme.title: Black-ish: Richard Youngsta
programme.desc: Dre is excited about doing a campaign with a popular rap star but becomes conflicted when Bow and Ruby provide feedback suggesting it plays on stereotypes. Meanwhile, Bow is determined to get the family to stop eating so much take-out food.

programme.title: Black-ish: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Dre's sister Rhonda is in town, and he feels a little jealous of her close relationship with Pops. Dre and Bow urge Zoey to take Junior to a high school party, and things get out of hand.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: Bow's sister comes to town after filming a stint on a reality show, and they couldn't have less in common. Meanwhile, Zoey suggests that Dre spend more time with Junior since she’s leaving for college, and Jack and Diane decide to rebrand themselves.

programme.title: Movie: Imperium

programme.title: Movie: King Arthur: Legend of the Sword

programme.title: Movie: Edge of Tomorrow
programme.desc: A military officer in a war against an alien race becomes caught in a time loop after he is killed in combat. Forced to experience the same battle over and over, he becomes more proficient with each return, and comes closer to defeating the enemy.

programme.title: Movie: R.I.P.D.

programme.desc: After being betrayed during a mission, a black ops soldier seeks her revenge.
