programme.title: Archer: Deadly Velvet Part I
programme.desc: Archer and the gang are hired by renowned director, Ellis Crane, to investigate suspicious activity on the set of his movie, 'Deadly Velvet.'

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: Great Bear Stakeout

programme.title: Planet Earth: The Best of The Hunt

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands
programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.title: Wild West: The High Country
programme.desc: America's High Country is the last of grizzly bears and giant trees, of frigid winters and scorching summers, of tough ranchers and gold-rush fever. From the Rockies to the Sierra Nevada, survival in this land of extreme seasons demands endurance.

programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains

programme.title: Wild Alaska
programme.desc: The rugged coast of our biggest state harbours the most incredible wildlife in America. Nat Geo cameras take an intimate look at Alaskan wildlife from winter to summer.

programme.title: Alaska's Glacier Bay
programme.desc: Nestled in the heart of southeast Alaska, Glacier Bay is a wild paradise of ocean and ice. Brown bears, bald eagles, humpback whales and nearly every other species here are ultimately tied to the incredible migration and life cycle of salmon.

programme.title: Wild Yellowstone: The Frozen Frontier
programme.desc: Yellowstone's fierce winter forces wildlife into a struggle for survival against heavy snows, polar temperatures and ferocious predators.

programme.title: Wild Yellowstone: Grizzly Summer
programme.desc: In summer, Yellowstone is a wildlife paradise but has a dark side that tests every animal.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: New Chicks in the Flock
programme.desc: Charles and Beth show off a flock of peachicks and a little chicklet to Doc and Diane.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Good Wool Hunting
programme.desc: Kids and their animals prepare to compete at the 2018 Isabella County Fair.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Fell From the Sky
programme.desc: Revealing some of the strangest things that have fallen from the sky around the world.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Places
programme.desc: An American lake that swallows land and boats; a road in Scotland where gravity seems to be suspended and cars roll up hills; an island where tourists get their kicks surfing the jet streams of planes.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom
programme.desc: A terrifying sea fortress, a highway in the Amazon that suddenly vanishes, and a mysterious structure in the shadow of the Statue of Liberty are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery in the Outback
programme.desc: A giant carving of a strange creature suddenly appears in the Australian Outback. Mysterious bright green lights illuminate the seas around Thailand. Top secret activity is discovered at Iran's nuclear facility.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Did We Find Flight 370?
programme.desc: Investigators find a new clue about the missing Malaysia Airlines flight that disappeared in 2014. An astronaut spots something strange in the Sahara Desert. A mysterious orange sludge invades a remote village in Alaska.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Mummy Desert
programme.desc: New evidence could reveal the remains of an ancient Roman city thought to be lost forever. Strange images from a remote and empty desert could explain the mysterious mummies found there. An apocalyptic sandstorm swallows the Middle East.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Raiders of the Holy Lance
programme.desc: A heavily armored force takes over one of Syria's most ancient archaeology sites, prompting fears that its relics are being stolen. Tanks appear to be facing off in Antarctica next to an unworldly object. A water reservoir in LA suddenly turns black.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Valhalla
programme.desc: When experts investigate an ancient network of tunnels rumored to be the hiding place of lost royal treasure, they find evidence of human sacrifice for the Viking god Odin. An abandoned fortress in Siberia might shed new light on Genghis Khan.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Fleet of Cannibal Bay
programme.desc: See a fleet of sunken ships that point to ghosts, cannibals, and bloodshed in early America; strange Arctic holes that NASA can't explain; and near Area 51, mysterious alien structures straight out of Star Wars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: When instruments on the International Space Station suddenly malfunction every time it passes over a mysterious site in the Atlantic Ocean, experts investigate if this eerie behaviours is more than just a tech glitch, but a prophecy of global doomsday.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Doomsday Forest
programme.desc: When mysterious structures are discovered deep in a remote forest, experts investigate if this strange site was the long-lost birthplace of a top-secret Nazi project that produced some of the deadliest weapons the world had ever seen.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Goliath
programme.desc: A lost city near Jerusalem might have been the home of Goliath. Bizarre underwater formations might point to a top-secret US weapons testing facility. A strange sighting in the Arctic could be a lost Nazi relic or the icy remains of prehistoric monsters.

programme.title: What on Earth?: One Ocean
programme.desc: Six breath-taking images, six unfathomable mysteries; from a gigantic tsunami hundreds of feet high that never hits land, to a secret underground base in China and has an image from space finally revealed the location of the Garden of Eden?

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Curse of Merlin
programme.desc: The myth of Merlin is associated with an arrangement of stones in northern France, and satellite images might finally explain this ancient riddle. Investigators uncover something mysterious buried beneath the Gulf of Mexico. An island suddenly appears.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Death Threat
programme.desc: The warden receives an anonymous letter from an inmate threatening to organize a group to attack correctional officers.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Scott/ Trey
programme.desc: A man starts new life only to find himself caught up in a high-speed pursuit due to drugs.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Robert/ Montrell
programme.desc: A man suffering from bipolar disorder runs from the police; shots fired as man eludes.

programme.desc: Angola is a brutal maximum-security prison known as the 'Bloodiest Prison in America.' Most of the facility's 5,000 inmates will never see the outside world again.

programme.title: The Big House: Attica Prison
programme.desc: This prison was hailed as a model for the confinement of the most dangerous criminals.

programme.title: The Big House: Leavenworth
programme.desc: An exclusive look at America's first federal prison. Operating since 1895, Leavenworth has had its share of notoriety - from The Birdman of Alcatraz and exciting escapes to bloody riots and escalating violence.

programme.title: The Big House: LA County Jail
programme.desc: Explore the LA County Jail, with 20,000 inmates and a roster that reads like a Who's Who.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Riding Solo
programme.desc: Henry Conravey has successfully completed 12 weeks of field training but after a series of mistakes is not sure he'll be allowed to patrol the streets on his own. Chris Cade is looking forward to getting is own patrol car.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: The Lost Rookie
programme.desc: Charles was an officer in the military for several years, but is starting at the bottom again as a rookie cop in Jefferson Parish. When he disobeys protocol, Greg is furious and worried for his safety.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: Command Presence
programme.desc: Amy has issues with German Shepherds and being attacked by a K-9 is part of training.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: The Birth of a Rookie
programme.desc: Rookie Denny Cooper's father-in-law questions his decision to join the police when his wife is about to give birth and Dennis is off restraining a husband after a hit-and-run. Rookie Hugh Herndon begins on the wild streets of Tampa.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Dead Ringer/ My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: Neighbours always mix up sisters Sarah and Stevie, but their polar-opposite personalities is what set them apart in the end. Elena and Christina were both adopted, but these teenage sisters love, laugh, and battle like blood relatives.

programme.title: My Evil Sister
programme.desc: Stories of sisters who do the unthinkable - killing their sibling or someone else.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Turns to Hate
programme.desc: Love is a powerful emotion but so is hate.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love of Money
programme.desc: These Deadly Women sacrificed their loved ones to satisfy their 'Love of Money.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Innocent blood spills when these deadly women reach their tipping point.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Twisted Desires
programme.desc: Every murder is a tragedy but some are plain barbaric.

programme.title: Body Cam: Worst Case Scenario
programme.desc: A relationship breakup turns deadly; a minor traffic stop puts a child's life at stake; a killer on the run leaves a State Trooper fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Shots Fired
programme.desc: A domestic dispute turns into a hostage situation with children's lives at stake; an apparent vehicle accident turns into a shocking multiple murder with armed killers on the run; a disturbance at a liquor store leaves an officer fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: My Name is Death
programme.desc: Officers confront a knife-wielding suspect. In Florida, a man who flees into the woods is outsmarted by a K9 Officer. In Indiana, a gunman wages war on police, caught on surveillance cameras, until SWAT closes in.

programme.title: Body Cam: Disorderly Conduct
programme.desc: A police officer tracks down an armed carjacker and comes under heavy fire. A stabbing in broad daylight forces the police to take decisive action. A routine traffic stop results in an officer being shot and fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Shots Fired
programme.desc: A domestic dispute turns into a hostage situation with children's lives at stake; an apparent vehicle accident turns into a shocking multiple murder with armed killers on the run; a disturbance at a liquor store leaves an officer fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: My Name is Death
programme.desc: Officers confront a knife-wielding suspect. In Florida, a man who flees into the woods is outsmarted by a K9 Officer. In Indiana, a gunman wages war on police, caught on surveillance cameras, until SWAT closes in.

programme.title: Body Cam: Disorderly Conduct
programme.desc: A police officer tracks down an armed carjacker and comes under heavy fire. A stabbing in broad daylight forces the police to take decisive action. A routine traffic stop results in an officer being shot and fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Worst Case Scenario
programme.desc: A relationship breakup turns deadly; a minor traffic stop puts a child's life at stake; a killer on the run leaves a State Trooper fighting for his life.

programme.title: Home Alone: Behind the Shower Curtain
programme.desc: Catherine thinks that dumping her boyfriend will solve her problems, but when he breaks into her home intending to kill her, he takes her family hostage.

programme.title: Home Alone: Silent Night, Holy Terror
programme.desc: In Alabama in 2010, sassy teenager Haley craves her independence, but her protective mom, Teresa, worries about the company she's keeping. Teresa convinces Haley to end her toxic relationship, but he won't let go until he gets what he wants.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Guilt by Association
programme.desc: David Johnson tagged along with his brother to a New Year's Party. By the end of the night, one man was dead and David was a suspect. Now serving hard time, his family insists he was just a naïve teenager who was at the wrong place at the wrong time.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Beneath the Surface
programme.desc: There are only two explanations for how Patty Wlasiuk ended up dead after her truck plunged into a lake. Her husband Peter insists it was a suicide attempt, but a jury says he killed her. Now Chris and Melissa try to figure out what really happened.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Convicted by a Hair
programme.desc: In 2011, 19-year old KC Grondin got his first girlfriend, but later that same year, he was charged with her murder. Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva have been called in by KC's passionate parents, who are convinced he was the victim of a rush to judgment.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: As He Lay Frozen
programme.desc: On a freezing Minnesota night, a ruthless shooting leaves a young police officer fighting for his life by the roadside. As his wife awaits his fate, a heart-stopping manhunt ensues. As the killers escape, officers don't know who they'll strike next.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Cold Blue
programme.desc: Kay Weden finds her mother inexplicably murdered inside her own home. Then, investigators discover the frozen remains of her boyfriend in the icy peaks of Blue Ridge Mountains. Only by speaking with Kay do investigators realize she's being stalked.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Frozen Waters
programme.desc: When a mother and her two young children mysteriously go missing, her family goes to their home only to discover it empty. Then, two local boys nearby also disappear.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Missing on Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A mother's worst nightmare becomes a reality when her 12-year-old son is abducted on Christmas Eve. Detective Waters soon learns this was not the first time the child went missing.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Overkill
programme.desc: A young woman finds her beloved neighbour, Rebecca Claybrook, beaten to death in her own home. The men in Claybrook's life are put under the microscope by Detective Fil Waters.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: When two Yellow Cab drivers are murdered in under a week, the city of Houston is thrown into a frenzy. Detective Fil Waters soon learns that there are recordings of the same female voice luring the drivers to their deaths.

programme.title: The Interrogator: You Know What Time It Is
programme.desc: A mother of two is shot to death outside her apartment complex just minutes after returning home from her 30th birthday celebration. After interviewing multiple witnesses and suspects, Detective Fil Waters uncovers a shocking lead caught on video.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape in Underwear
programme.desc: Ricky McCurry has been in and out of prison his whole life, escaping by tricking and bribing guards. On the outside, McCurry runs into bad luck with botched robberies and high-speed chases.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Pretend to Be a Cop
programme.desc: Peter Gibbs is a career criminal who is constantly lured to the dark side after every prison release, despite vowing to go straight. After a string of robberies catches up to him, he faces decades behind bars but refuses to go down without a fight.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: After getting arrested for robbery, Robert Askew runs from a work camp and goes back to stealing to make a living. Askew eventually gets caught again, but he escapes from jail during a hurricane and goes on a crime spree, breaking into vacation homes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape with a Battleaxe
programme.desc: Russell Kerr is serving a 60 year sentence for a crime he says he didn't commit. He and a fellow inmate, Christopher Stout, mastermind an elaborate escape. After busting through the prison gates, they risk life and limb for their one shot of freedom.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run With My Buddy
programme.desc: Larry McClendon, while in prison for murder, escapes with seven others. Larry is forced to be creative in his evasion of the cops; hiding in abandoned shacks, and muddy pigpens, and even dressing as a woman as a disguise.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower

programme.desc: Maximum reach makes the Sniper Rifle an Ultimate Weapon. With the accuracy and stopping power to take out small targets a mile away, the military sniper can put demands on the weapon that will achieve amazing results.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The 100th Episode

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack

programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Don't Rain on My Pug-rade/ Their Royal Pug-ness
programme.desc: When Bob can't leave his house to watch a parade, the pups enlist a family of ducks to march past the house. Bingo and Rolly head to England to learn how a queen is treated.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Terrible Two-Some / Owlette's Luna Trouble
programme.desc: Gekko has to babysit his two teammates, Kitty Boy and Chiclet, and save the world. Owlette must put aside her jealous feelings to get back Luna Girl's board and magnet from Romeo.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Sky Pirates / The Disappearing Ninjas
programme.desc: When Night Ninja steals equipment from Pirate Day at school, Catboy jeopardizes the PJ Masks rescue mission. PJ Masks investigate Night Ninja when the ninjalinos keep disappearing!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bark Bowl / When Hedgie Met Sallie
programme.desc: The pups get trained by a puppyball expert for the puppyball championship. Hedgie helps the pups catch the veggie bandit in Bob's vegetable patch.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puggy-ology/ Squirrels Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Chef Goofy on the Go!
programme.desc: Let's ride with Mickey helping Chef Goofy On the Go serve up food far and wide.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Aye, Aye Captain Mickey
programme.desc: Mickey and the Clubhouse pals board Professor Von Drake's new submarine for an underwater adventure.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: How Kermit Got His Groove/ One Small Problem

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Upside-Down Day / Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: When Summer has a case of bad-day-itis, Gonzo's cure is turning the whole playroom upside down. Later, Animal loses a tooth but the Tooth Fairy didn't leave him anything.

programme.desc: Billy Beagle films the garage crew as they try to turn a junker into a winning roadster in one day. The Happy Helpers help a TV chef rescue the Hot Dog Diner.

programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Clarabelle's Clubhouse Carnival

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy on Mars
programme.desc: Goofy crash-lands on Mars and it's up to the Sensational Six to save him.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Grasshopper
programme.desc: Mickey and pals help Daisy find her new friend, Wilbur the Grasshopper.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: A Surprise for Minnie
programme.desc: Mickey enlists our help in making and delivering a special card for Minnie.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald of the Desert
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends travel to the faraway Desert to get sand for the Clubhouse Sandbox.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep on Food Truckin'
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.desc: Chilly forms a special bond with Mumbo, a rambunctious baby mammoth. When Mumbo is ready to be delivered to the Toyarctic, Chilly must find a way for them to remain friends!

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Froginizer/ My Fair Animal
programme.desc: The Muppet Babies play superheroes. Piggy and Summer help Kermit discover his superpower.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Caution: Kids at Work! / The Snoozy Doozy Pet and Breakfast!
programme.desc: Buddy is Mickey's number one fan, and he can't wait to get to work for Mini=Mechanics day. Then, The Happy Helpers need to transform the Snoozy-Doozy into a pet hotel when they get so many pet-sitting requests.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Chin Up, Pups / The Wind Beneath My Paws

programme.desc: Gekko finds a crystal that gives him powers, but it turns out the powers are too strong! While Gekko tries to stop the Ninjalinos on his own, Night Ninja tries to take over HQ!

programme.desc: When Kit and Sareena refuse to expose the secret ingredients in their renowned family recipes; Kit investigates a string of robberies.

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: Vampirina: Face the Music/ Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: Poppy writes a song for the Ghoul Girls to perform in the school talent show; Vee and her friends are invited to a sleepover at the museum hosted by King Pepi.

programme.desc: After their powers are stolen and given to the Woflies, the PJ Masks ally with them to vanquish Romeo. Night Ninja hypnotizes all of the school kids with his special ninja dance!

programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy and his fairy godparents have magical adventures.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Action Packed/ Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Timmy wishes his life could be like an action movie, and that he could know everything.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Hail to the Chief/ Twistory
programme.desc: Timmy decides to run for Student Body President to capture the affections of Trixie Tang.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Is for Alien/ Jeanette Enchanted
programme.desc: When Theodore disappears from his bed, Alvin is positive that he has been kidnapped by aliens. The Chipmunks and Chipettes join forces in order to offer Jeanette a magical, fairy-tale birthday.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Let Them Eat Crumbs/ Who Ghosts There
programme.desc: Eleanor has prepared a cake for a Bake-Off. But Brittany and Alvin come home and eat the cake without knowing its importance! Later, worried that Dave will move the family to his dream house, the boys make the house seem haunted.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: He Said She Said/ Attack of the Zombies
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany give wildly differing versions of why the fire alarm went off at the school. Convinced a zombie invasion is imminent, Alvin and Theodore attempt to protect their loved ones.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Cheese and Crockers/ Land Before Timmy
programme.desc: Timmy wishes up a machine that will allow him to merge with other objects for Half Day.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dadbracadabra/ Timmy Turnip
programme.desc: With a little help from Timmy, Dad's magic tricks really work. Convinced that Timmy's dad is a fairy, Crocker is out to prove it and uncover his secret on national television. / Timmy meets his grandparents and quickly wishes they never came to America.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Boss of Me/ He Poofs, He Scores
programme.desc: Dad takes Timmy to his office on Bring Your Kids to Work Day. Also, Timmy is talented at soccer.

programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.desc: A look inside Patrick Star's rock; SpongeBob must wait for a toy to arrive in the mail.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: To Love a Patty/ Breath of Fresh Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes the perfect Krabby Patty; Squidward begins to get on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongicus/ Suction Cup Symphony
programme.desc: Plankton builds a Roman coliseum, and puts on a free gladiator show featuring togas, chariots, and ferocious lionfish. / Squidward is determined to win the Bikini Bottom Symphony's composition contest, but SpongeBob and Patrick keep distracting him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Two Faces of Squidward/ Spongehenge
programme.desc: SpongeBob slams the door in Squidward's face; Squidward gets surgery and becomes handsome.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Splinter
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a splinter at work and tries to remove it before Mr. Krabs finds out and sends him home early.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: House Fancy/ Krabby Road
programme.desc: SpongeBob helps Squidward redecorate his house. / Plankton forms a rock band with SpongeBob.

programme.desc: With SpongeBob's help, Mr. Krab attempts to fool his granddad into thinking he's a pirate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Big One
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward and Mr. Krabs are swept away by a giant wave.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gullible Pants/ Overbooked

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tentacle-vision/ I Heart Dancing
programme.desc: Squidward gets a TV show. / SpongeBob has a dance audition.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Room of One's Own/ Carts and Crafts
programme.desc: Alvin convinces Dave to give him his own room, but soon realizes living alone isn't what it's cracked up to be. When Alvin inadvertently destroys Theodore's bicycle, he enters the boys in contest to win a new bike.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Clowning Around/ Bully for You

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Origami Tsunami/ Donnie’s Gifts
programme.desc: Our wannabe heroes try to solve the biggest little problem in the city. The Turtles have to fight their bad habits and a mutant chef.

programme.title: Mad Mel: The Rise and Fall of a Hollywood Icon
programme.desc: Mel Gibson was once considered Hollywood royalty and had the image of a friendly, family man. Now head inside his meltdown to hear the tapes and speak with people who know him.

programme.desc: The life and times of this multi-talented actor, director and musician.

programme.title: Uncle Hitler
programme.desc: Those related to Hitler, the most hated man in history, his family members and employees.

programme.title: Heroes of World War II With Walter Cronkite: The Air War
programme.desc: On September 1, 1939, Germany invades Poland starting the greatest war the world has ever known. Six million Jews and countless 'undesirables' were exterminated by the Nazis. There were millions of Allied and Axis casualties.

programme.title: The Nazi War Machine of WWII: The Black Order
programme.desc: The creation of the Nazi War Machine is explored.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler: The Tunnel
programme.desc: Finding a never before discovered tunnel leading from Hitler's bunker directly to Tempelhof Airport where Hitler's personal plane awaited.

programme.title: Who is Donald Trump?
programme.desc: Hear from those who know Trump best including family, celebrities, authors, friends and enemies in this provocative psychological profile that explores the mind of Donald Trump.

programme.title: America's 9/11 Flag: Rise From the Ashes
programme.desc: This program uncovers the mystery and search of the iconic Ground Zero 9/11 Flag.

programme.title: Dummycrats
programme.desc: Social media stars Diamond and Silk travel across America to expose how the Democrats put the interests of lawbreakers over those of citizens.

programme.title: Brad Meltzer's Decoded: Secret Presidential Codes
programme.desc: The team investigates the secret presidential codes of Thomas Jefferson and how they may be partially responsible for the death of one of the world's greatest explorers, Meriwether Lewis.

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: Mel, Help Save My Sister
programme.desc: Brianne says her sister Stephanie has become a total stranger due to alcohol and abuse, and turns to Mel in order to save their relationship.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Monkey
programme.desc: Ross introduces the guys to his new roommate, Marcel, who happens to be a monkey. Meanwhile, Chandler suggests a 'no-date New Year's Eve', which no one is really excited about.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: To Have and Withhold
programme.desc: Molly has writer's block and she might lose her big advance if she doesn't cure it fast.

programme.title: Mom: Patient Zero and the Chocolate Fountain
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie's contentious relationship makes them unwelcome guests wherever they go.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hey, I Can Pee Outside in the Dark
programme.desc: Jake continuously plays 'Smoke on the Water' on his guitar and has developed a grumpy attitude. Alan tries a father/son chat, Charlie offers a jam session and Berta thinks Jake is just constipated.

programme.title: Black-ish: Dog Eat Dog World
programme.desc: The family is divided over the idea of getting a dog after Dre and Bow promise Jack they can get one after he gets Straight A's and he does. Meanwhile, Bow's brother Johan is in town and he doesn't get the warm welcome he expects from Ruby.

programme.title: Black-ish: One Angry Man
programme.desc: Dre is forced to participate in jury duty after Junior responds to the summons that was thrown away. The case is supposed to be open and shut, but when Dre sees that the defendant is a young African American, he feels responsible to give him a fair trial.

programme.title: Charmed: Curse Words
programme.desc: Maggie and Mel fear Jordan's curse is alive and well. Macy and Harry confront their unspoken feelings.

programme.title: Dynasty: What Sorrows Are You Drowning?
programme.desc: Anders seeks help finding Kirby, so Fallon assembles Sam, Colby, Culhane, and Adam for the mission. Cristal and Alexis have a historically epic encounter.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross's Sandwich
programme.desc: Ross becomes upset with his co-workers when he finds his sandwich is missing.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Virgin
programme.desc: Jerry and George strain to come up with an idea for their TV series for the network.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Carl Gets a Girl
programme.desc: Mike spends time at Molly's house, bonding with her mother and sister, when Carl borrows his apartment for a date.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Slowly and in a Circular Fashion
programme.desc: When Walden's ex-wife and mother try to take control of his company, he tries to enlist Alan as an ally.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Spaceballs
programme.desc: Adam tries to start a Mel Brooks club after he sees the movie 'Spaceballs,' and Jackie mistakes his club advertisement for political satire and puts it in the school paper.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: There Can Be Only One Highlander Club
programme.desc: Despite Beverly wanting the two boys to bond, Adam and Johnny Atkins compete for the head of the Highlander Club at school. Meanwhile, Barry tries to keep the JTP from sharing Murray's fate of falling out of touch with his high school friends.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Gym and Juice
programme.desc: When the shower at Max and Caroline's apartment breaks, they get part-time jobs at a fancy gym's juice bar and enjoy free use of the locker room. However, their jobs and free showers are jeopardized when Caroline has a run-in with a group of rich moms.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Baby Come Back
programme.desc: Derwin tells Melanie how he really feels about her, while Malik proclaims his love for Robin.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Home Sweet Loan
programme.desc: Mike has convinced Kristin and Ryan to buy a home instead of renting an apartment. But when he finds the ideal place for them, Ryan surprises everyone with a change of heart and backs out of the idea.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack Hanna and his crew travel the globe to film animals in their natural habitat.

programme.desc: Jack Hanna and his crew travel the globe to film animals in their natural habitat.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack Hanna and his crew travel the globe to film animals in their natural habitat.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School

programme.title: Did I Mention Invention?
programme.desc: Fascinating stories of invention are shared and everyday innovators are highlighted.

programme.title: House Smarts

programme.title: Raw Travel: The Heart of Texas

programme.title: Movie: Next Day Air
programme.desc: After a drug parcel is mistakenly delivered, the receivers think that they will be rich.

programme.title: Movie: Just Like Heaven
programme.desc: When a workaholic doctor is seriously injured in a horrible car accident, her spirit is left lingering somewhere between Heaven and Earth in her old apartment, where a lonely architect is now living.

programme.title: Movie: Down to You
programme.desc: A man finds the girl of his dreams only to discover that she is not ready for commitment.

programme.title: Movie: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: After his son witnesses a murder, an FBI agent goes undercover at an all-girl's school to find the murderer.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: Arthur
programme.desc: A loveable millionaire risks it all when he falls in love with an irascible waitress.

programme.title: Movie: Arthur 2: On the Rocks
programme.desc: A billionaire loses his fortune and struggles to regain his dignity and his wealth.

programme.title: Movie: The Station Agent
programme.desc: A man who was born with dwarfism finds his solitude interrupted by a vendor and a woman.

programme.title: Movie: College

programme.title: Movie: Everybody Wants to Be Italian
programme.desc: A man and a woman pretend to be Italian to win each other's affection.

programme.title: Movie: Deliver Us From Eva
programme.desc: An uptight woman constantly meddles in the affairs of her sisters and their husbands.

programme.title: Movie: Search Party
programme.desc: Hijinks and misadventures abound when a young man's two best friends step up to rescue him after a carjacking and reunite him with his wayward bride-to-be.

programme.title: Movie: Life as We Know It
programme.desc: When their mutual best friends die, two single adults find themselves named as guardians of their friend's orphaned daughter.

programme.title: Movie: An Ideal Husband
programme.desc: A husband's seemingly perfect life is threatened by evidence of a past misdeed.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: The Tok'ra
programme.desc: Captain Samantha Carter has a vivid dream, in which she sees through the eyes of Jolinar.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: The Tok'ra
programme.desc: Samantha Carter's father, who is dying of cancer, agrees to become a host for a Tok'ra.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Spirits
programme.desc: When a team fails to check in from a routine survey and negotiation mission, and an arrow shot through the Stargate wounds Col. O'Neill, SG-1 is sent to find them.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Touchstone
programme.desc: The SG-1 team uncover a government agenda that has sinister implications.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: The Fifth Race
programme.desc: A mysterious device fills O'Neill's mind with the knowledge of the Ancients. He soon begins to speak their language and act impulsively based on the new information, but if he doesn't get rid of it, he will die.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: A Matter of Time
programme.desc: The SG-1 team and the Earth become threatened by a black hole's gravitational pull.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Holiday
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters Machello, an old inventor who is wanted by the Goa'uld for crimes against the System Lords. One of his inventions allows him to swap bodies with Daniel, but no one notices until it is too late.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Serpent's Song
programme.desc: Apophis, who is pursued by a powerful Goa'uld, begs the team to grant him sanctuary.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: One False Step
programme.desc: The SG-1's presence in an alien community causes a mysterious illness.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Show and Tell
programme.desc: In a war of attrition against the Goa'ulds, a race of aliens plot to kill all of mankind.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: 1969
programme.desc: The SG-1 travels back in time and is captured by the U.S. military.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Out of Mind
programme.desc: When O'Neill awakens in a futuristic world, he is told that he has been frozen for years.
